summary: Iteration 46: Tested AI Website Builder feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. Fixed a bug where theme update endpoint expected query parameter instead of JSON body - updated both backend and frontend to use proper JSON body format.
passed_tests: GET /api/ai-builder/business-types - returns list of 15 business types
POST /api/ai-builder/generate - creates website with valid input (AI generation ~10-15s)
POST /api/ai-builder/generate - returns 422 for missing required fields
GET /api/ai-builder/website/{id} - returns website data
GET /api/ai-builder/website/{id} - returns 404 for invalid ID
PUT /api/ai-builder/website/{id} - updates content successfully
PUT /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/theme - updates to modern theme
PUT /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/theme - updates to corporate theme
PUT /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/theme - updates to startup theme
PUT /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/theme - updates to minimal theme
PUT /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/theme - returns 400 for invalid theme
PUT /api/ai-builder/website/{id}/theme - returns 404 for invalid ID
Generated content has proper structure (brand, homepage, about, services, contact, blog, footer)
Homepage has features array with title/description
Services has services array with title/description
Blog has articles array with title/summary
Contact has required fields (email, phone)
About has substantial content text
UI: Input form loads at /ai-builder with all fields
UI: Business Name input field present
UI: Business Type dropdown with 15 options
UI: Description textarea present
UI: Location input (optional) present
UI: Generate button triggers AI generation
UI: Loading state shows 'Creating Your Website' with progress bar
UI: Preview displays after generation with toolbar
UI: Page navigation tabs work (Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact)
UI: Theme selector changes website colors
UI: Edit mode activates with Save button
UI: Publish modal opens with Download HTML, Copy HTML, Get Professional Help options
UI: Back button returns to input form
critical_code_review_comments: AI generation uses Gemini 2.5 Flash via emergentintegrations - working correctly
Website content is cached in MongoDB ai_websites collection
Theme update endpoint was fixed to accept JSON body instead of query parameter
Frontend properly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Export HTML generates standalone HTML with Tailwind CDN - good for portability
seed_data_creation: Created test websites: TEST_AI_Builder_Cafe, TEST_Website_Ops, TEST_Theme_Test, TEST_Content_Structure, Sunrise Bakery, Tech Solutions Inc
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 verified the AI Website Builder feature. All endpoints working: business-types, generate, get/update website, theme update. The AI generation takes 10-15 seconds using Gemini 2.5 Flash. Fixed theme endpoint to accept JSON body {"theme": "modern"} instead of query parameter. Test websites were created in MongoDB ai_websites collection.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Theme update endpoint returning 422 Unprocessable Entity
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend endpoint expected 'theme' as a query parameter (async def update_theme(website_id: str, theme: str)) but frontend was sending it as JSON body
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added ThemeUpdateRequest Pydantic model and updated endpoint to accept JSON body. Also updated frontend to send {"theme": "value"} instead of just "value"
